# Chatr+

> Chatr+ is an AI superapp for India: chat, calls, healthcare, business tools, local commerce, and earning — all in one app by TalentXcel Services.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Chatr+ superapp.
- [About](/about): Company, mission, and team behind Chatr+.
- [Help](/help): Support center and FAQs.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Chatr+ team.
- [Download](/download): Install Chatr+ on Android and iOS.
- [Health Hub](/health): Personalized AI wellness dashboard.
- [Care Access](/care): Book doctors and access healthcare services.
- [Local Jobs](/local-jobs): Discover hyperlocal job opportunities.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Shop products and local services.
- [AI Browser](/ai-browser): AI-powered web browsing assistant.
- [Communities](/communities): Join interest-based groups and circles.
- [Chatr Studio](/chatr-studio): Creator tools for stories and content.
- [Chatr Games](/chatr-games): Play and earn rewards.
- [Chatr Wallet](/chatr-wallet): Coins, rewards, and UPI payouts.
- [Chatr World](/chatr-world): Geo discovery of local services.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Refund Policy](/refund)
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer)
